clusters.headline: Achraf Hakimi, Morocco’s World Cup captain, to stand trial on rape charge
clusters.summary: A French appeals court confirmed that Hakimi will face trial for the alleged rape of a woman in 2023, which he denies.

clusters.headline: Champions Arsenal host promoted Coventry in 2026-27 Premier League opener
U.S. strike on an alleged drug boat kills 3 in the eastern Pacific Ocean
clusters.summary: The latest attack brings the number of people who have been killed in boat strikes by the U.S. military to at least 211 since the Trump administration began targeting those it calls "narcoterrorists" in early September.

clusters.headline: Thirty-five killed as gunmen attack Niger's biggest airport
clusters.summary: Niger has been fighting a militant Islamist insurgency for a decade and in January suspected jihadists attacked the same airport.

clusters.headline: Zimbabwe MPs pass bill to extend president's time in power
clusters.summary: The proposal would extend Emmerson Mnangagwa's term by two years and scrap direct presidential elections.

clusters.headline: Sudan: The European Union Delegation in Sudan - a New Political Engagement or an Attempt to Exert Pressure From Within?
clusters.summary: [Dabanga] Amsterdam / Khartoum / Port Sudan -- A high-level delegation of heads of European Union missions, comprising 14 diplomats and headed by the head of the mission to Sudan, Wolfram Vetter, concluded a visit to Sudan, the first of its kind since the outbreak of war on April 15, 2023. clusters.headline: Singapore's new wellness destination in 2030: Pools, water slides, saunas and tropical gardens at Marina South
clusters.summary: The upcoming wellness development is set to open at Marina South in 2030 and will span more than 720,000 sq ft of gross floor area – about the size of nine football fields.

clusters.headline: Cleaning company driver admits to causing death of elderly colleague by driving off when she was alighting
clusters.summary: The 72-year-old victim's death was tragic and avoidable, the prosecution said.

clusters.headline: Africa: Mokoena Strike Keeps South Africa's World Cup Hopes Alive After Battling Draw With Czech Republic
clusters.summary: [CAF] South Africa refused to let their FIFA World Cup dream fade away as a late Teboho Mokoena penalty earned Bafana Bafana a hard-fought 1-1 draw against the Czech Republic in Atlanta on Thursday, keeping their hopes of reaching the knockout stages firmly alive.

clusters.headline: Africa: South African Scientists Make Breakthrough in Decoding Cancer's Most Effective Survival Strategy
clusters.summary: [The Conversation Africa] In the intricate biology of the human body, organs such as the breast, the colon and the lungs are lined with a defensive barrier known as the epithelium.
